zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bellers於1396年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯時，她的父親Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby18歲，母親Elizabeth de Sutton9歲。她於大約1413年與Robert Digby 1 husband結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年4月26日在英國爾布洛阿德亞斯享年79歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bellers于1396年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯时，她的父亲Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby18岁，母亲Elizabeth de Sutton9岁。她于大约1413年与Robert Digby 1 husband结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年4月26日在英国爾布洛阿德亞斯享年79岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Bellers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bellairs
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bellars , suggesting French belle(s) aire(s) ‘lovely demeanor’.

variants.name: Bellars
meanings: (of Norman origin): apparently from Old French bélier ‘ram’, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a ram in some way or possibly a metonymic occupational name for a shepherd. In Northamptonshire the name attracts excrescent -s already by 1377.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bellers was born in 1396, in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby, was 18 and her mother, Elizabeth de Sutton, was 9. She married Robert Digby 1 husband about 1413. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 26 April 1475, in Broadheath, Cheshire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bellers est née en 1396, à Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Sutton, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Digby 1 husband environ 1413. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 avril 1475, à Broadheath, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bellersが1396年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルビー ベラーズで生まれた時，父Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettlebyは18歳，母Elizabeth de Suttonは9歳であった。約1413年にRobert Digby 1 husbandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1475年4月26日にイギリスチェシュアイアブロアドヒースで79歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bellers(이)가 1396년 영국 레이스스터실르 커비 벨라러스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Sutton(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 대략 1413년 Robert Digby 1 husband(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 4월 26일 영국 체실르 브로드히스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Digby 1 husband aproximadamente 1413. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bellers родилась в 1396 г. в местности кирби белларс, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Sutton, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Digby 1 husband около 1413 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 апреля 1475 г. в местности броадхит, чешир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия.
